title: helenium aucherianum
intro: Helenium aucherianum, also known as Aucher's sneezeweed, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family that grows in mountainous regions. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and expectorant effects, which help to relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The plant is rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, providing various health benefits, including antioxidant, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic properties. Helenium aucherianum is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of respiratory tract infections.
